trivia: The G650 is Gulfstream's flagship: a purpose-built ultra-long-range jet that cruises at Mach 0.925, making it one of the fastest civil aircraft flying since Concorde retired. The G650ER stretches the range past 13,800 km.
In 2015 a G650ER flew from White Plains to Beijing in under 12 hours, one of dozens of city-pair records the type holds. If your station caught one, it was probably in a hurry.
